reasoning.evidence: The handler uses the `nablarch-fw-standalone` module, which is the Nablarch standalone framework that underlies Nablarch batch processing. The concept of 'プロセス終了コード' (process exit code) is specific to standalone/batch execution. The official doc URL is under `handlers/standalone/`, and the constraint references `:ref:\`main\`` which is the standalone main handler entry point. All of these strongly indicate this handler belongs to the Nablarch standalone batch pattern.
No mention of Jakarta Batch, JSR 352, jBatch, Batchlet, Chunk, or javax.batch anywhere in the content.
No mention of RESTful, JAX-RS, @Produces, @Consumes, or JaxRsMethodBinder in the content.
No mention of HTTPメッセージング, HTTP受信, メッセージ同期応答, or HttpMessagingRequestParsingHandler in the content.
No mention of Webアプリケーション, サーブレット, JSP, HttpRequest, or セッション管理 in the content. Process exit codes are not a web application concept.
No mention of MOMメッセージング, MQ, キュー, 非同期メッセージ, or MomMessagingAction in the content.
No mention of DB連携メッセージング, テーブルキュー, 電文, or DatabaseRecordReader in the content.
